disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe worsening occipital headache present for several hours
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the headache — where is it and how bad?
When did the headache start and has it changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a pounding pain right at the back of my head. It started dull when I woke up and it's got a lot worse over the last few hours.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Very high self-measured home blood pressure reading
trigger_question_examples: Have you measured your blood pressure at home?
What number did your home machine show?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My home cuff showed 200 over 115 a little while ago — that's what scared me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Spontaneous epistaxis that resolved with pressure
trigger_question_examples: You mentioned a nosebleed — how long did it last?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My nose started bleeding on its own out of nowhere. It stopped after about ten minutes when I pinched it, but it gave me a fright.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Stopped previously prescribed antihypertensive six months ago
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any regular medications?
Have you ever been on blood pressure tablets, and are you still taking them?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I was on a blood pressure tablet — amlodipine I think — but I stopped taking it about six months ago because I felt completely fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dizziness and lightheadedness on sudden exertion or standing
trigger_question_examples: Are you feeling dizzy or lightheaded?
Does anything bring the dizziness on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I feel dizzy and lightheaded, especially if I stand up or move suddenly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Palpitations and easy fatigability over the past month
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed your heart racing or pounding?
Have you been more tired than usual recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For the last month or so my heart has felt like it's pounding on and off, and I've been getting tired really easily.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No focal weakness, no slurred speech, no visual loss, no chest pain — key emergency features screened
trigger_question_examples: Any weakness or numbness in your face, arm or leg?
Any slurred speech, vision changes, or chest pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, no weakness or trouble speaking, my vision is okay and I don't have any chest pain.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Headache is a gradual throbbing build-up, not a sudden thunderclap onset, and there is no neck stiffness
trigger_question_examples: Did the headache come on like a sudden explosion, or build up gradually?
Is your neck stiff or painful to move?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It built up gradually over a few hours rather than hitting me all at once, and my neck feels fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with acute anxiety amplifying the presentation
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone at home with you?
How are you feeling in yourself right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own. I'm honestly quite worked up and anxious since I saw that blood pressure number.
